title: Keep Britain Working Review: Final report
body: "This final report of the Keep Britain Working Review presents the findings and recommendation for the role employers can play in tackling health based economic inactivity and promoting healthy and inclusive workplaces, supporting people with health conditions and disabled people to succeed and stay in work.  Further information  We continue to welcome expressions of interest to join the Vanguard phase.  Vanguards will help drive momentum; test the practical adoption of initiatives and develop the evidence base for the expansion phase.   Vanguards will be asked to:    Embrace the healthy working lifecycle Provide workplace health provision Work with the Workplace Health Intelligence Unit to build the evidence base   If you want to receive more information, or you would like to become a vanguard, please email kbw.vanguards@dwp.gov.uk "
